hooks.command: if [ -z "$MLFLOW_CLAUDE_TRACING_ENABLED" ] || ! which mlflow >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; mlflow autolog claude stop-hook; if [ "$MLFLOW_TRACING_TRIGGER" != "always" ]; then sed -i.bak 's/"MLFLOW_CLAUDE_TRACING_ENABLED": "true"/"MLFLOW_CLAUDE_TRACING_ENABLED": "false"/' .claude/settings.local.json 2>/dev/null && rm -f .claude/settings.local.json.bak; fi

if [ -z "$MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI" ]; then exit 0; fi; curl -sf -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MLFLOW_TRACKING_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Mlflow-Workspace: $MLFLOW_WORKSPACE" -d '{"max_results":1}' "$MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI/api/2.0/mlflow/experiments/search" > /dev/null && echo "MLflow tracing: connected (trigger: $MLFLOW_TRACING_TRIGGER, state: $MLFLOW_CLAUDE_TRACING_ENABLED)" || echo 'MLflow tracing: NOT connected (run /trace-setup reauth to refresh token)'
